reasoning: The control SI-2 (2) focuses on automated flaw remediation and monitoring changes to network configurations, which can be mapped to Kubernetes by ensuring that changes to critical network and security configurations are logged and monitored. This includes auditing changes to NetworkPolicies and Ingress controllers. Additionally, ensuring that admission controllers are configured to automatically apply security patches and that API server monitoring is enabled aligns with the automated remediation aspect.
title: Flaw Remediation | Automated Flaw Remediation Status
